must_detect.matched_text: Transaction overview: Investor to subscribe for redeemable convertible preferred shares (RCPS) of the Company; target closing in Q4 [Year]; consideration KRW [TBD], subject to FSCMA compliance.

Indicative Term Sheet — Proposed RCPS investment in Orion Slope Co., Ltd. (Republic of Korea) by Sereon Pacific Partners Co., Ltd.
Transaction overview: Investor to subscribe for redeemable convertible preferred shares (RCPS) of the Company; target closing in Q4 [Year]; consideration KRW [TBD], subject to FSCMA compliance.
Use of proceeds: expansion of grid analytics and climate-adaptive software; ESG climate reporting tooling branded “ClimatePath Lite” (marketing brochure only).
Regulatory: FSC and FSS notifications as applicable; MRFTA filing if thresholds met; any KRX rules to be addressed if the Company pursues a KOSDAQ listing (already publicly noted in a 2025-03-10 press release).
Commercial terms (illustrative): dividend rate and conversion ratio to be set at signing; no change-of-control rights before KRX eligibility; sample term definitions appended for education only.
Information barriers and insider list: employees to follow standard training; a generic insider-list template is attached; no resident-number fields will be collected (use Employee ID format EMP-0000).
Blackout and tipping: routine blackout calendar for quarterly reporting and a do-not-tipping reminder poster will be circulated to staff; these materials are operational and not deal-specific.
Crypto reference: the Company’s “Orion CryptoLab” is an internal sandbox demonstrated at university job fairs; no token issuance or customer onboarding is planned under this term sheet.
Cyber incident tabletop: an annual drill is scheduled with the IT vendor; outcomes are for awareness only and will not alter commercial terms absent board approval.
Non-public note: the Company has identified a recent cyber incident affecting a legacy API endpoint with limited data exposure; remediation is in progress and no public disclosure has been made as of the date hereof.
Exclusivity: 60-day negotiation window; during this period the Company will finalize a non-public pilot integration with a domestic VASP for cold-storage workflows (subject to NDA).
Conditions precedent: customary due diligence, confirmation of no material adverse change, and delivery of board and shareholder resolutions; Business Registration No. [000-00-00000] placeholder only.
Employment and privacy: no collection of resident registration numbers; any onboarding forms will use masked fields and role mailboxes (e.g., ir@orionslope.example.kr).
Investor relations: for public queries, direct to the website FAQ and the general hotline (example) 000-0000-0000; this term sheet is non-binding and for discussion under Korean law.
